name: [Home] Internet Ping — Packet Loss to 8.8.8.8
message:
## Packet loss detected!

Packet loss to 8.8.8.8 is above threshold over the last 5 minutes.

- **Warning** (>5%): Minor instability
- **Critical** (>20%): Significant packet loss — internet connection may be dropping

Check your router and ISP connection.
